Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

我来检查AG2开发任务的状态。

首先检查young-river进程：

```bash
ps aux | grep young-river | grep -v grep
```

然后读取日志最后50行：

```bash
tail -50 ~/workspace/agent/workspace/ag2-output.log
```

最后检查outputs目录：

```bash
ls -lah ~/workspace/agent/workspace/outputs/ds160-helper/
```
